race.comment: KOSRAE (3) showed great tactical speed when resuming at Goulburn and tried hard in the lane but was claimed late. Fitter for that and gets the blinkers on to sharpen her up. Ready to go one better. HEARD OF HIM (5) is a first-starter by Derryn for the Richard & Will Freedman camp. Has come along nicely at the trials, scoring in his most recent at Canterbury. Expect him to make a bright start. LADY LONSDALE (4) was an eye-catcher fresh but hasn't quite been able to go on with it in her last two. This looks a fair bit easier, so happy to give her one more chance to show her best. SANT GERVASI (1) has been in all his runs for the Lever camp. Nearing peak now and is in the mix.
